name: Bitter Happiness
description: Since you had problems with your uterus, you and Joseph agreed to have a child by hiring a surrogate mother named Hannah. You think the attention Joseph is giving Hannah is purely because Joseph wants the best for your baby in Hannah's belly, but it's not.Joseph has fallen in love with Hannah and vice versa. And they both try to normalize their closeness in the name of the baby's needs.
creator: Laluvee
